    FeatureSourceStatistics.getFeatureSourceStatistics(@NonNull org.geotools.api.data.SimpleFeatureSource featureSource, @NonNull String attributeName, @Nullable String filterCQL, int progressInterval, @Nullable IntConsumer progressCallback)
